name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized receipts cause late expense reports. We automate expense reporting instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing expenses leads to delayed reporting.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing expenses leads to delayed reporting.
